kw.name: Open Browser And Login As User
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

test.name: TC-H1 - MyHistory Menu Visible When Logged In

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//a[@href='/myHistory' and contains(.,'ประวัติการรีพอร์ต')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[@href='/myHistory' and contains(.,'ประวัติการรีพอร์ต')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน'.
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล...
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน'.
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.name: TC3 - Report Card Displays Correct Information

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล...
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

test.name: TC4 - User Can Open Report Detail

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล...
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')])[1]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=(//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')])[1]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: รายละเอียดการรายงาน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ผู้ถูกรายงาน'.
kw.arg: ผู้ถูกรายงาน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'เลขที่การจอง'.
kw.arg: เลขที่การจอง
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'คำอธิบาย'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains

kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=(//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[contains(.,'ดูรายละเอียด')])[1]

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: รายละเอียดการรายงาน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'หลักฐานที่แนบไว้') or contains(text(),'ยังไม่มีหลักฐาน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'หลักฐานที่แนบไว้') or contains(text(),'ยังไม่มีหลักฐาน')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

test.name: TC6 - User Can Upload Valid Evidence

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ประวัติการรายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล...
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'อัปโหลดหลักฐาน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'อัปโหลดหลักฐาน')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: อัปโหลดหลักฐานสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.name: TC7 - Upload File Larger Than 10MB Should Fail

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
